---
title: "Welcome to My Visual Analytics Journey"
listing:
  contents: 
    - "Hands-on_Ex/**/*.qmd"   # <-- Capitalized to match your actual folder!
    - "Take-home_Ex/**/*.qmd"  # <-- (Assuming you will capitalize this one too)
    - "In-class_Ex/**/*.qmd"   # <-- (Assuming you will capitalize this one too)
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  page-size: 6
---

Welcome to **ISSS08 Visual Analytics and Applications**. In this website, you will find my coursework prepared for this course.
